name: m2_map_elites_first_batch
bootstrap_seed_bank: First eleven evaluations are fixed A/B/C tier MAP-Elites bootstrap seeds, now led by two A_estimator EKF/GPS delay probes and then weighted toward A-tier physical mismatch and wind.
scope_note: Random initialization is MAP-Elites bootstrap only. It is not the M3 random/grid baseline comparison.
